roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DEFT'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY FILED

/CAL:TO SET DA MTR/X:AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVETO TERMINATE PROBATION,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER,/X:ANY RESTITUTION RESULTING FROM THIS MATTER MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO, 15004960,/CTORD:PROBATION IN #13002605IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
/CAL:DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X:RONNIE WAGNER APPEARED FOR THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE LEGAL DEPT,(REAL PARTY OF INTEREST)/MO GRTD/X:NO ORDER WAS SIGNED/

/CAL:SENTENCING/X:THIS CHARGE IS A SERIOUS & VIOLENT FELONY & CONSIDERED ASTRIKE:/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 1 Y/CTS:22/4019HALF/CTWP:212/WS/DNA/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT MUST COMPLETE AT LEAST 1 YEAR OF ALCOHOL COUNSELLINGAND-OR 1 YEAR OF ANGER-MANAGEMENT COUNSELLING, TBD BY APD,/CTORD:THAT THEDEFENDANT'S HARVEY WAIVERS IN CASES 2404734 & 10027706 REGARDING STAY-AWAYORDER & RESTITUTION ARE ACCEPTED,/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT MUST ABIDE BY THE STAY-AWAY ORDER FILED ON 08-26-13: 150 YARDS FROM JOSE VILLANUEVA & CARLOS MORALES,/RESTV/VF4:280/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENTPLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:3/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT'S HARVEY WAIVERS IN CASES 2404734 & 10027706 REGARDING STAY-AWAY ORDER & RESTITUTION ARE ACCEPTED/SA1: 150 YARDS FROM JOSE VILLANUEVA & CARLOS MORALES/SAORD/ARBUCKLE/PRES:09-17-13/VD:PRELIM HRG OF 09-12-13/DISM3/CONTD:SENTENCING ON 01-20-12/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 04-02-13/987,2/BAIL:200,000/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
